> I've considered various options, leaning towards a comprehensive response. I chose the phrase "你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？" because it acknowledges the greeting while immediately offering assistance. I believe this option is optimal for initiating a helpful and productive interaction with the user.

你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？
